title: Infosys and Anthropic Announce Strategic Collaboration for Enterprise AI Solutions
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with Anthropic to develop and deliver advanced enterprise AI solutions across telecommunications, financial services, manufacturing, and software development. The collaboration will begin in telecommunications through a dedicated Anthropic Center of Excellence focused on building and deploying AI agents for industry-specific operations, then expand to other industries. The collaboration integrates Anthropic's Claude models, including Claude Code, with Infosys Topaz AI offerings to automate complex workflows, accelerate software delivery, build agentic AI solutions, support governance and transparency for regulated industries, and help modernize legacy systems. No deal value, duration, revenue impact, or financial guidance was disclosed.

key_facts.fact: The stated goals include helping enterprises automate complex workflows, accelerate software delivery, adopt AI with governance and transparency, and build agentic AI solutions for regulated industries.

key_facts.fact: Infosys and Anthropic plan to help clients build AI agents using tools such as the Claude Agent SDK for long, complex, multi-step processes.

key_facts.fact: The collaboration will also help organizations modernize legacy systems by combining Infosys Topaz and Claude to accelerate migration and reduce the cost of updating aging infrastructure.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys and Anthropic Announce Collaboration to Unlock AI Value across Complex, Regulated Industries

key_facts.fact: Infosys is already deploying Claude Code within its own Exponential Engineering organization.

important_text_spans.text:
Infosys  (NSE,  BSE,  NYSE:  INFY),  a  global  leader  in  next-
generation digital services and consulting, today announced a strategic collaboration with Anthropic, an AI safety and research company, to develop and deliver advanced enterprise AI solutions to companies across telecommunications, financial services, manufacturing, and software development.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys and Anthropic Announce Collaboration to Unlock AI Value across Complex, Regulated Industries
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the main collaboration announcement, counterparty, and target industries.

important_text_spans.text: The collaboration will begin in telecommunications with a dedicated Anthropic Center of Excellence to build and deploy AI agents tailored to industry-specific operations.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys and Anthropic Announce Collaboration to Unlock AI Value across Complex, Regulated Industries
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the initial industry focus and dedicated center.

important_text_spans.text: At its core, the collaboration integrates Anthropic's Claude models, including Claude Code, with Infosys Topaz AI  offerings  to  help  enterprises  automate  complex  workflows,  accelerate  software  delivery,  and adopt AI with the governance and transparency that regulated industries require.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys and Anthropic Announce Collaboration to Unlock AI Value across Complex, Regulated Industries
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the product integration and stated enterprise AI use cases.

important_text_spans.text:
The collaboration will also help organizations modernize legacy systems, combining Infosys Topaz and Claude to accelerate migration

and reduce the cost of updating aging infrastructure.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys and Anthropic Announce Collaboration to Unlock AI Value across Complex, Regulated Industries
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the stated legacy modernization impact.
